subcodes.first_line: O Sage! Upon thee be My Glory! This blessed Tablet was revealed in the previous year concerning its dispatch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حکیم علیک بهائی این لوح مبارک در سنه قبل نازل در ارسال ان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
